title: Once More With Feeling The Buffy The Vampire Slayer Musical Episode Tribute Concert
company: Behind the Curtain Theatre Productions CIC
description: Behind the Curtain Theatre Productions presents their production of Once More, With Feeling: A Live "Buffy the Vampire Slayer" musical tribute concert. Step into the supernatural world of Buffy the Vampire Slayer like never before with Once More, with Feeling: A live musical concert tribute. Get ready to slay the night away as talented performers bring your favourite characters to life through iconic song and dance in this electrifying tribute to the incredible musical episode. Sing along to the memorable tunes, feel the nostalgia, and immerse yourself in the magic of Sunnydale in this one-of-a-kind live musical experience! "It was hilarious! The team did a great job bringing the episode to life on stage." "Brilliant show, I very much enjoyed this show." "Absolutely wonderful, will definitely be seeing again." "We had so much fun! Thank you."
